name: Neranjno
css: .nerajno-card { width: 100%; height: 100%; position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #0d0d1a; overflow: hidden; font-family: 'Georgia', serif; } .nerajno-bg { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 30% 40%, #1a0a3d 0%, #0d0d1a 60%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 80% 70%, #0a1a3d 0%, transparent 60%); } .nerajno-bg::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, transparent, transparent 2px, rgba(100,60,255,0.03) 2px, rgba(100,60,255,0.03) 4px); } .nerajno-content { position: relative; text-align: center; } .nerajno-name { font-size: clamp(1.4rem, 5vw, 2.4rem); font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.06em; color: #fff; text-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(130,80,255,0.9), 0 0 30px rgba(130,80,255,0.5), 0 0 60px rgba(100,60,255,0.3); animation: nerajno-pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite; } .nerajno-handle { font-size: clamp(0.7rem, 2.5vw, 1rem); color: rgba(180,140,255,0.75); letter-spacing: 0.18em; margin-top: 0.4em; text-transform: lowercase; } .nerajno-dots { display: flex; gap: 0.5em; justify-content: center; margin-top: 1em; } .nerajno-dots span { width: clamp(5px, 1.5vw, 8px); height: clamp(5px, 1.5vw, 8px); border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(130,80,255,0.8); animation: nerajno-blink 1.6s ease-in-out infinite; } .nerajno-dots span:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.3s; } .nerajno-dots span:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.6s; } @keyframes nerajno-pulse { 0%, 100% { text-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(130,80,255,0.9), 0 0 30px rgba(130,80,255,0.5), 0 0 60px rgba(100,60,255,0.3); } 50% { text-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(160,100,255,1), 0 0 50px rgba(130,80,255,0.8), 0 0 90px rgba(100,60,255,0.5); } } @keyframes nerajno-blink { 0%, 100% { opacity: 0.3; transform: scale(0.8); } 50% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1.2); } }
